sqlMap.select: select * from member
select no, title, regdate from (select row_number() over(order by no desc) as r , no, title, regdate from event) where r between #startrow# and #endrow#
select no, title, regdate from (select row_number() over(order by no desc) as r , no, title, regdate from qna) where r between #startrow# and #endrow#
sqlMap.insert: insert into info_xbox (no,title,nickname,sub_file1,sub_file2,sub_file3,sub_file4,sub_file5,pwd, recom,read_count,reply_count, cont, regdate) values(info_xbox_seq.nextval,#title#,#nickname#,#sub_file1#,#sub_file2#,#sub_file3#,#sub_file4#,#sub_file5# ,#pwd#,#recom#,#read_count#,#reply_count#,#cont#,sysdate)
insert into com (no, bbsname, bbsno, nickname, com, pwd, regdate) values (com_seq.nextval,'info_xbox',#bbsno#,#nickname#,#com#,#pwd#,sysdate)
sqlMap.update: update info_xbox set title=#title#,sub_file1=#sub_file1#,sub_file2=#sub_file2#,sub_file3=#sub_file3#, sub_file4=#sub_file4#,sub_file5=#sub_file5# ,pwd=#pwd#,cont=#cont# where no=#no#
update info_xbox set read_count=read_count+1 where no=#value#
sqlMap.delete: delete from info_xbox where no=#num#
delete from com where bbsname='info_xbox' and bbsno=#value#
delete from com where bbsname='info_xbox' and bbsno=#bbsno# and no=#comno#

sqlMap.update: update info_xbox set recom=recom+1 where no=#value#
sqlMap.select: select count(*) from com where bbsname='info_xbox' and bbsno=#value#
select count(*) from info_xbox
select count(*) from info_xbox where nickname like #value#
select count(*) from info_xbox where title like #find_name#

select no, title, nickname, regdate, nvl(read_count, 0) read_count from (select row_number() over(order by no desc) as r, no, title, nickname, regdate, read_count from info_xbox) where nickname like '%'|| #find_name# ||'%' and r between #startrow# and #endrow#

select no, title, nickname, regdate, nvl(read_count, 0) read_count from (select row_number() over(order by no desc) as r, no, title, nickname, regdate, read_count from info_xbox) where title like '%'|| #find_name# ||'%' and r between #startrow# and #endrow#
